description_long: This sculpture depicts a bust of a human figure, likely male, with stylized facial features and short, wavy hair. The figure is dressed in a blue outer garment draped over the shoulders and a red lower garment, with a white shirt or tunic visible on the chest. The bust is mounted on a rectangular wooden base, which appears weathered and aged. The surface of the sculpture shows visible cracks, chips, and signs of wear, suggesting it is old or has been exposed to the elements. The back of the bust is roughly finished and less detailed, with the form blending into a solid block that supports the figure. The overall appearance is rustic, with muted colors and a matte, slightly rough finish.
description: A weathered bust of a human figure with blue and red garments, mounted on a wooden base, showing visible cracks and a rustic, matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed face, blue draped garment, white chest, and red lower section, with visible cracks and wear.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the draped blue garment, and the transition to the wooden base.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the roughly finished back of the bust, with minimal detail and a solid block-like support.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the profile of the head, the draped blue garment, and the wooden base, similar to the left side.
attribute_location_context: No specific installation context is visible; the sculpture is shown isolated against a plain background.
